definition:
1. anything that encircles  the head, for defence or ornament: 
2. the brim  of the helmet, projecting behind as well as before, (Iliad by Homer) 
3. part of a woman's head-dress, a diadem, coronal , (Iliad by Homer), etc.:—;metaphorically, of a city, ἀπὸ στεφάναν κέκαρσαι πύργων thou hast been shorn of thy coronal  of towers, (Euripides) 
4. the brim  or edge  of anything, the brow of a hill, edge of a cliff , (Iliad by Homer); of a basket, (Moschus Bucolicus) (ML)
